title: bromus mollis var. simplicissimus
intro: Bromus mollis var. simplicissimus, also known as soft brome or downy brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is a perennial grass native to Europe and Western Asia, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant. The health benefits of Bromus mollis var. simplicissimus include its potential to help with respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
